title.en: In vitro diagnostic test systems - Requirements for blood-glucose monitoring systems for self-testing in managing diabetes mellitus
title.zh: 体外诊断检验系统 - 用于糖尿病管理自测的血糖监测系统的要求

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for blood glucose monitoring systems for self-testing by people with diabetes. Covers accuracy, precision, user performance. Confirmed 2019.
standards.scope: Blood glucose monitoring systems for patient self-testing.

title.en: Point-of-care testing (POCT) - Requirements for quality and competence
title.zh: 即时检验(POCT) - 质量和能力要求

standards.abstract: Provides requirements for quality and competence in point-of-care testing. Applies to POCT performed in hospitals, clinics, and physician offices. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Quality and competence requirements for point-of-care testing environments.
standards.note: WITHDRAWN 2022-12-06. Replaced by ISO 15189:2022 Annex A (POCT requirements integrated). Retained for historical reference.

title.en: In vitro diagnostic medical devices - Information supplied by the manufacturer (labelling) - Part 1: Terms, definitions and general requirements
title.zh: 体外诊断医疗器械 - 制造商提供的信息（标签） - 第1部分：术语、定义和通用要求

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for information supplied by the manufacturer of IVD medical devices. Edition 2. Covers labelling of POCT devices.
standards.scope: Labelling requirements for IVD and POCT devices.

title.en: Susceptibility testing of infectious agents and evaluation of performance of antimicrobial susceptibility test devices - Part 1: Broth micro-dilution reference method for testing the in vitro activity of antimicrobial agents against rapidly growing aerobic bacteria involved in infectious diseases
title.zh: 感染性病原体药敏试验和抗菌药物药敏试验设备性能评价 - 第1部分：检测感染性疾病中快速生长需氧菌体外抗菌活性的肉汤微量稀释参考法

standards.abstract: Reference method for antimicrobial susceptibility testing. Used as reference standard for validating POCT antimicrobial resistance devices. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Reference method for antimicrobial susceptibility testing (POCT AMR devices).

title.en: Medical laboratories - Requirements for quality and competence
title.zh: 医学实验室 - 质量和能力要求

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for quality and competence of medical laboratories. Edition 4. Applicable to laboratory-based POCT supervision and quality management.
standards.scope: Medical laboratory quality requirements (covers POCT within laboratory governance).
